creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#testing-poudriere-setup>

> … the FreeBSD Handbook Subversion section.

* refers to non-existent 
  <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#svn-mirrors>

----

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

> … removal now would be premature.

On the other hand, let's not forget <https://docs-legacy.freebsd.org/doc/12.3-RELEASE/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/> for users of 12.3-RELEASE. 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/doc/> is signposted from the front page of the current edition of the FreeBSD Handbook.
